source: MOLO PACKS CHECKLISTS spreadsheet (21 sets, 2095 rows)

exemplars.card_description: 2024 Bowman Chrome Elly De La Cruz Refractor #42 (Serial Numbered 409/499)
exemplars.notes: Clear image of the base Refractor parallel for 2024 Bowman Chrome, showing the characteristic rainbow shine. Card is serial numbered /499.

exemplars.card_description: 2023-24 Panini Donruss Optic Purple Shock Prizm Amen Thompson Rated Rookie
exemplars.notes: Vibrant user-supplied phone capture showing true Purple Shock color saturation.

exemplars.card_description: 2017 Donruss Optic Holo Patrick Mahomes II Rated Rookie #177 PSA 10
exemplars.notes: High-quality scan of a PSA 10 graded card showing the silver rainbow Holo finish. Sourced via CardLadder link to Fanatics Collect. PSA CardFacts was inaccessible due to persistent security checks.

exemplars.card_description: 2020 Panini Donruss Optic #163 Justin Jefferson Blue Hyper
exemplars.notes: Found via PSA certification lookup. The image provides a clear view of the "Blue Hyper" parallel pattern on a 2020 Donruss Optic Justin Jefferson rookie card.

exemplars.card_description: 2013-14 Panini Prizm Alonzo Mourning #244 Red White & Blue Mosaic Prizm
exemplars.notes: The "Red White Blue (Mosaic)" parallel is also known as "Red White & Blue Mosaic Prizm" in some Panini products like 2013-14 Panini Prizm. This image clearly shows the mosaic pattern combined with the red, white, and blue color scheme.

exemplars.card_description: 2024 Topps Chrome Update Series Mitchell Parker #USC13 X-Fractor
exemplars.notes: Clear scan from COMC showing the distinct checkerboard X-Fractor pattern.

exemplars.notes: Vibrant user-supplied phone capture of Disco parallel.

exemplars.notes: Vibrant user-supplied phone capture of Green Shock parallel.

exemplars.card_description: 2015 Panini Prizm Football Jameis Winston Tie-Dye Prizm RC /25
exemplars.notes: Clean marketing image from Beckett News showing the swirling Tie-Dye parallel pattern in the flagship 2015 Panini Prizm Football set.

exemplars.card_description: 2024 Panini Select Premier Level Blue Prizm DeMarcus Ware
exemplars.notes: Vibrant user-supplied phone capture of Blue Prizm parallel.

exemplars.card_description: 2021-22 Panini Prizm #165 Austin Reaves (Blue Wave Prizm Parallel)
exemplars.notes: The image clearly shows the distinct Blue Wave parallel pattern, characterized by a blue color with a vertical wavy/undulating texture typical of Panini Prizm parallels.

exemplars.card_description: 2024 Panini Donruss Optic Preview Red Pandora Prizm Devin Leary
exemplars.notes: Vibrant user-supplied phone capture of Red Pandora parallel.

exemplars.card_description: 2024-25 Panini Prizm Red Prizm Stephon Castle
exemplars.notes: Vibrant user-supplied phone capture of Red Prizm parallel.

exemplars.card_description: 2018 Panini Prizm #78 Trae Young Silver Prizm GEM MT 10
exemplars.notes: The image is a clear, high-quality scan from PSA CardFacts showing the silver refractive finish of the Silver Prizm parallel.

exemplars.card_description: 2010-11 Donruss - Production Line - Cracked Ice #4 - Kobe Bryant
exemplars.notes: The Cracked Ice parallel is a staple of Panini products like Donruss Optic and Donruss Elite. This specific image is from the 2010-11 Donruss Production Line insert set, which prominently features the Cracked Ice pattern.

exemplars.card_description: Topps Chrome Gold Refractor Derrek Lee
exemplars.notes: Vibrant user-supplied phone capture of Gold Refractor parallel.

exemplars.card_description: 2024-25 Panini Donruss Optic - Winner Stays - Green Hyper Prizm #13 - Dirk Nowitzki /249
exemplars.notes: The Green Hyper parallel (often listed as 'Green Hyper Prizm' on COMC or 'Hyper Green' in some checklists) features a vibrant green background with a repeating circular/diamond 'hyper' pattern typical of Donruss Optic mega box exclusives. Image sourced from COMC provides a high-resolution view of the finish.

exemplars.card_description: 2023-24 Panini Contenders Optic - Rookies - Gold Lazer Prizm #21 - Kris Murray /2 [PSA 9 MINT]
exemplars.notes: The 'Lazer' parallel in the Optic brand (specifically Contenders Optic) features a distinct pattern of straight, intersecting lines resembling laser beams. The image shown is a 'Gold Lazer' variant, which is the most prominent and high-quality representation of the 'Lazer' pattern available on COMC for the Optic brand. Found via [COMC](https://www.comc.com/Cards/Basketball/2023-24/Panini_Contenders_Optic_-_Rookies_-_Gold_Lazer_Prizm/21/Kris_Murray/27770633/Graded/PSA/9).

exemplars.card_description: 2023 Bowman Chrome Prospects Mega Box Mojo Refractor #BCP-71 Roman Anthony
exemplars.notes: The Mojo parallel (often referred to as 'Mega Box Mojo') features a distinct checkered/tiled refractor pattern and is typically found in Bowman Mega Box releases.

exemplars.card_description: 2024 Panini Prizm Draft Picks Red Ice Prizm Drake Maye
exemplars.notes: Vibrant user-supplied phone capture of Red Ice parallel.

exemplars.notes: Vibrant user-supplied phone capture of White Sparkle parallel.

exemplars.notes: Vibrant user-supplied phone capture of Blue Sparkle Refractor.

exemplars.card_description: 2024 Panini Prizm - [Base] - Pink Ice Prizm #221 - Masataka Yoshida
exemplars.notes: Found a high-quality image of the Pink Ice parallel on COMC. The image clearly shows the characteristic pink color and 'ice' (cracked ice) pattern associated with this Prizm parallel.

exemplars.card_description: 2024 Topps Chrome Joe Alt #237 (Rookie) Pink Refractor
exemplars.notes: Clean, well-lit image from COMC showing the pink border characteristic of the Pink Refractor parallel in Topps Chrome.

exemplars.card_description: Panini Donruss Press Proof Greg Rousseau
exemplars.notes: Vibrant user-supplied phone capture of Press Proof parallel.

exemplars.card_description: 2024 Panini Prizm Prizmatic #2 Drake Maye (Silver Prizm parallel of the Prizmatic insert set)
exemplars.notes: Prizmatic is a distinct insert set in Panini Prizm known for its vibrant, prismatic/rainbow-like background patterns. While technically an insert set, it is often collected for its unique 'Prizm' finish. This image shows the Silver Prizm parallel version of the insert, which highlights the clean holographic effect. Found via [PSA Cert Verification](https://www.psacard.com/cert/145553546/psa).

exemplars.card_description: 2023 Panini Prizm Joey Logano #11 Zebra Prizm
exemplars.notes: Found on COMC. The image clearly shows the black and white zebra pattern characteristic of this parallel.

exemplars.card_description: 2021 Panini Prizm A.J. Brown Black & White Checker #1
exemplars.notes: High-quality scan from PSA Cert Verification showing the distinct black and white checkered border pattern of the parallel.

exemplars.card_description: 2023 Panini Donruss Optic LeBron James #65 Blue Glitter Prizm PSA 10
exemplars.notes: High-quality scan from PSA Certificate Verification page showing the distinct Blue Glitter finish.

exemplars.card_description: 2024-25 Panini Mosaic - Color Blast #17 - Paolo Banchero
exemplars.notes: Found on COMC. The parallel is 'Color Blast', which is an SSP insert in the Mosaic brand starting from the 2024-25 season.

exemplars.card_description: 2024 Panini Prizm - Emergent - Green Ice Prizm #3 - Bo Nix [PSA 10 GEM MT]
exemplars.notes: The image clearly shows the 'Green Ice' parallel pattern on a Bo Nix Emergent insert from 2024 Panini Prizm.

exemplars.card_description: 2025 Panini Prizm - [Base] - Green Scope Prizm #192 Throwback Tyler Reddick /149
exemplars.notes: The Green Scope parallel features a green border with a circular/scope-like pattern throughout the card surface. Image sourced from COMC as PSA and Beckett pages lacked direct images or were blocked by security.

exemplars.card_description: 2020 Panini Prizm #307 Joe Burrow Neon Green Pulsar Prizm (PSA 9)
exemplars.notes: Clean, well-lit image from Card Ladder showing the distinctive Neon Green Pulsar pattern (square/pixelated 'pulsar' texture with neon green coloring). Also found on COMC but Card Ladder provided a higher quality single-card focus.

exemplars.card_description: Panini Mosaic Visionary Bo Nix
exemplars.notes: Vibrant user-supplied phone capture of Visionary insert.

exemplars.card_description: 2023-24 Panini Crown Royale Kaboom! #17 Jordan Hawkins
exemplars.notes: The Kaboom! insert is a super-short print (SSP) parallel featuring an animated player illustration against a distinctive explosive foil pattern. This image from COMC provides a clear, well-lit view of the parallel finish.
